reviews.comment:
Los baños dejan mucho que desea... cuando hay algún evento en la zona eso les afecta mucho..
Por no tener infractuctura.. los baños sin papel y ni jabón. En época de pandemia es muy complicado.. a ver las autoridades si se respobsabilizan de esta situación

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms leave much to be desired... it really affects them when there's an event in the area. Because of the lack of infrastructure, the restrooms don't even have toilet paper or soap. During a pandemic, it's especially difficult... let's see if the authorities take responsibility for this situation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLam95V1hnEAE
